'''Quegh''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He commanded the [[Centax-class heavy frigate|''Centax''-class heavy frigate]] [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']] at the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]].<ref name="Trial" />
